headline: Susquehanna Maintains Neutral on Norfolk Southern, Raises Price Target to $360
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Bascome Majors   maintains Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $337 to $360.
